name: The armoury
description:
This armoury was the showcase for the King's extensive weapons collection.

Now it looks like it has been ransacked.  Racks that used to hold swords are
now empty, hooks that were meant to carry armour are doubly so.  Big display
cases that held the most rare weapons are now devoid of them.  In their search
for weapons, the defenders of Dale must have thrown caution to the wind and
have destroyed most of the display stands.  Broken racks, cases, chairs and all
sorts of rubble lie strewn around the room.  The only thing that has been left
untouched is a large mirror fixed to one of the walls.
